localizations.title: The Ghost Stone
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Did you notice the tilted letters LE on the mailbox?
localizations.hint_2_first: This text doesn't make a lot of sense. Maybe it's not complete.
localizations.hint_2: Capital letters are… well, capital. Combine this scrap of paper with the other one to form a sentence that ignores the small letters!
localizations.hint_5_first: This text doesn't make sense. A piece may be missing.
localizations.hint_5: Capital letters are… well, capital. Combine this scrap of paper with the other one to form a sentence that ignores the small letters!
localizations.hint_7: With this tool, you can open almost anything. It may not be subtle, but it works!
localizations.hint_11: The place is well lit. You might need some extra light to dispel the shadows at some point.
localizations.hint_12: Nothing hidden here, just take card 21.
localizations.hint_21_first: The ghost seems to draw a symbol in the mist. You should mimic him. But first, try to make the mirror foggy!
localizations.hint_21: We can't help you here anymore. Ask for hints in the machine.
localizations.hint_22: There is no way to open the safe by randomly moving the wheels. Maybe someone can help!
localizations.hint_29: Letters can look very much like numbers when you look at them from a certain angle.
localizations.hint_31: A key, a door. You know what to do, right?
localizations.hint_37: Although you don't have a tie, this tiepin might be useful as it can slide into very small spaces.
localizations.hint_39: There is a way to push the key out of the lock.
localizations.hint_51: As you don't own the key to the manor, you should use a more direct (and rather aggressive) method.
localizations.hint_58: Take cards 11, 22, and 39. And don't forget what the ghost told you!
localizations.hint_66: Three reversed numbers in the mirror… where could you use them?
localizations.hint_68: This painting is really, really dark. If only you had something to light it up!
localizations.hint_73_first: Place your fingers on the planchette… you should be able to contact the resident spirit!
localizations.hint_73: Put a least two fingers on the planchette and see what happens! It moves toward certain letters… the spirit wants to communicate!
localizations.hint_76: You should be able to slide the carpet under the door and get the key.
localizations.hint_79: Don't forget to take the card with the number you can see on the painting. But keep this card, too. It might be useful again.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Once both scraps of papers (2 and 5) are placed correctly, reading only the capital letters allows you to read "The color of my hat". Look at the painting! Also, you can definitely see a shape here!
localizations.answer_hint_29: Turn the card upside down. The LE in LETTERS can be read as 37.
localizations.answer_hint_31: Use the key (31) on the lock (39).
localizations.answer_hint_39: To push the key out of the lock (39), use the tiepin (37). Be sure to keep the door card (39), it will be useful.
localizations.answer_hint_51: Use the crowbar (7) on the door (51) to open it.
localizations.answer_hint_66: The numbers are in a mirror. Reversed, they read: 459. That's the combination for the safe (22)!
localizations.answer_hint_68: Use the lantern (11) on the painting (68).
localizations.answer_hint_70: Take cards 68 and 73. Nothing more here!
localizations.answer_hint_73: The planchette points successively at the letters T, W, E, L, V, and E.
localizations.answer_hint_76: Slowly pull the carpet (76) under the door (39). Some numbers appear!
localizations.machine_21: Congrats! You managed to draw a circle on the mirror; a message appears in its center.
localizations.machine_22: You have found the jewel! Great job! Get out of the manor quickly… and now that you know how to play, why not try a full Unlock! adventure?
localizations.machine_73: The ghost guides you by indicating that a secret room is hidden behind the bookcase.
localizations.machine_22_open: Great! The safe is open. Now, you have to find the right precious stone.
localizations.machine_21_step_1_hint: The ghost is gone. Maybe you should mimic him but… how can you make the mirror fog up?
localizations.machine_21_step_1_answer: Press the hot tap and the mirror will be covered in mist. Then, do as the ghost did!
localizations.machine_21_step_2_hint: The ghost seems to want to help you. Now you have some mist, maybe you can communicate with him?
localizations.machine_21_step_2_answer: Mimic the ghost by drawing a circle in the mist with your finger.
localizations.machine_22_step_1_hint_1: There is no way to open the safe by randomly moving the wheels. Maybe someone can help!
localizations.machine_22_step_1_hint_2: You need the code to open the safe. The ghost will help you if you solve the mirror puzzle!
localizations.machine_22_step_2_hint: Paper scraps (2) and (5) complete each other. Look for a shape and a color.
